title: podman machine start continually fails with vfkit error
body:
### Issue Description

Had podman working via Podman Desktop a few weeks ago, but after returning to it now, getting errors just trying to start up. Completely uninstalled Podman Desktop, did `brew uninstall podman-compose` and `brew uninstall podman`, and tried starting over with just a brew install. Am able to `init`, but when trying to `start`, keep running into `Error: vfkit exited unexpectedly with exit code 1`. 

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Run `podman machine start`


### Describe the results you received

```
podman machine start dbhs
Starting machine "dbhs"
Error: vfkit exited unexpectedly with exit code 1
```

### Describe the results you expected

VM starts with no issue

### podman info output

```yaml
OS: darwin/amd64
provider: applehv
version: 5.0.2
```


### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

None

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

Additional environment details

### Additional information

Additional information like issue happens only occasionally or issue happens with a particular architecture or on a particular setting

comments.body: Is this a M1/2/3 mac? Your podman info says amd64 (intel) so you have the wrong bianry installed as mentioned in the blog, you need to install the arm version.
Ah yes thanks, it was an Apple Silicon mac and installing brew native and then podman did fix it!
